tagline: Building full-stack web experiences with modern technologies & AI.
description: Computer Science student specializing in full-stack development and AI-integrated systems — healthcare coordination, distributed OS simulation, and AI-powered productivity.

roles.detailed: Full-Stack Developer · AI-Integrated Systems · CS Student

bio: Computer Science student at Bennett University specializing in full-stack development and AI-integrated systems. I've built production-grade platforms across healthcare coordination, distributed OS simulation, and AI-powered productivity — including a live Vercel deployment that manages infrastructure in real time via natural language. I've also led 5+ campus tech events reaching 5,000+ students and secured a Casio Japan collaboration as Head of Marketing for the GFG Student Chapter. AWS-certified across Cloud Foundations, Security, Architecting, and Data Engineering.

bullets: Prospected 10+ companies via LinkedIn outreach, authored tailored sponsorship pitches, and secured 3 confirmed sponsorships to fully fund the student hackathon.
Crafted proposals aligned to each sponsor's event objectives, improving conversion rate and ensuring the hackathon remained fully self-funded.
experience.desc: Prospected 10+ companies via LinkedIn outreach and secured 3 confirmed sponsorships to fully fund the student hackathon. Proposals aligned to each sponsor's objectives kept the event fully self-funded.

bullets: Managed official correspondence between Bennett University and international partner institutions, drafting delegation outreach emails and exchange program proposals.
Coordinated orientation and onboarding for 20+ international students, streamlining their transition to campus life.
experience.desc: Managed official correspondence between Bennett University and international partner institutions — delegation outreach, exchange program proposals, and onboarding for 20+ international students.

bullets: Supported the CEO directly by attending strategy sessions, preparing briefing documents and decks, and coordinating cross-functional communication between the executive office and other teams.
Tracked progress across active initiatives, identifying timeline risks early to keep deliverables on schedule.
experience.desc: Supported the CEO directly — strategy sessions, briefing documents and decks, and cross-functional coordination. Tracked active initiatives and flagged timeline risks early to keep deliverables on schedule.

bullets: Planned and executed 5+ tech events, coding contests, and workshops end-to-end — managing content, logistics, and post-event coverage, collectively reaching 5,000+ students across campus.
Secured a Casio collaboration that brought representatives from Japan to campus — the first international industry partnership for the chapter.
Analyzed chapter engagement data to evaluate campaign effectiveness, iterating on outreach and event strategies to sustain growth momentum.
experience.desc: Planned and executed 5+ tech events reaching 5,000+ students across campus. Secured a Casio collaboration bringing representatives from Japan to campus — the chapter's first international industry partnership.

bullets: Perform exploratory data analysis on financial datasets — profiling, cleaning, and surfacing patterns that inform product decisions.
Apply statistical data analysis techniques to validate hypotheses and turn raw numbers into actionable insights.
experience.desc: Data analyst internship focused on exploratory and statistical data analysis — profiling and cleaning financial datasets, validating hypotheses, and turning raw numbers into actionable insights.

projects.title: NeuroFS-DOS
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Distributed Virtual Operating System
projects.desc: AI-powered distributed virtual OS deployed live on Vercel that enables infrastructure management via natural language. Features a custom N-Ary Tree virtual file system, Trie-based search with autocomplete, LRU cache, distributed node management with heartbeat-based failure detection, an RPC engine simulating inter-node communication with replication and fault recovery, and OS scheduling algorithms (FCFS, Round Robin, SJF, Priority). The AI layer runs an Intent → Planner → Execution pipeline powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash, with a real-time analytics dashboard.

projects.title: City Healer
projects.subtitle: Clinical Grid Coordination Platform
projects.desc: Production-grade healthcare coordination platform supporting Patients, Doctors, Hospitals, and Admins with real-time sync, featuring a custom "Clinical Green" design system and Framer Motion micro-interactions. Backend implements custom JWT middleware via Firebase Admin SDK for server-side token verification before any request reaches business logic, with role-based document mapping and an automated metadata pipeline that provisions clinical context on user signup. Google's @google/genai SDK powers server-side diagnostic suggestions — API key never exposed to the client.

projects.title: StudyLock
projects.subtitle: Intent-Based Study Application
projects.desc: Focus application using intent recognition to detect task drift and proactively reduce distractions before they derail study sessions. Formally pitched the concept to a live audience, including product design rationale, market positioning, and UX reasoning.

publications.title: AWS Academy Graduate — Cloud Architecting
publications.desc: Covers designing resilient, scalable architectures on AWS — compute, storage, networking, and high-availability patterns following the Well-Architected Framework.

publications.title: AWS Academy Graduate — Data Engineering
publications.desc: Data pipelines and analytics on AWS — ingestion, transformation, storage design, and processing at scale with cloud-native data services.

publications.title: The Bits and Bytes of Computer Networking
publications.desc: Full networking stack from the five-layer model up — TCP/IP, routing, DNS, DHCP, and troubleshooting real-world connectivity problems.

publications.title: AWS Academy Graduate — Cloud Security Foundations
publications.desc: Security fundamentals on AWS — IAM, the shared responsibility model, and securing cloud workloads. Earned alongside AWS Cloud Foundations.
